title: Investigation: Northern Independence Party (GB) (now de-registered)
text:
Subject: Northern Independence Party (GB) (now de-registered)

Investigated for: Late delivery of Statement Of Accounts (SOA) for 2023

Decision: No determination of offence

Summary of reasons: The Commission decided that it would not be proportionate to continue with the investigation as the Party provided the outstanding SOA to the Commission, thus restoring transparency in political finance, and was no longer registered as a political party. No determination of offence was therefore made, and the case was closed with no further action.
